query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: An abstract, indistinct form appears in darkness, with soft, pale shapes suggesting a reclining human figure or body emerging from near-total blackness. The pale areas hint at curved contours of skin or fabric, possibly a torso, limbs, or folded fabric, positioned horizontally across the lower portion of the frame. The surrounding space is overwhelmingly dark, swallowing most contextual detail. A watermark at the bottom left corner reads '© dali_lama_2k.dpchallenge.com'.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, heavily blurred and underexposed image shows soft, pale indistinct forms of what might be a reclining human figure or body almost lost in near-total darkness. The extreme blur obliterates fine detail, rendering surfaces into ghostly, smeared shapes with no clear edges or textures. Deep underexposure crushes almost all shadow information into pure black, while the minimal visible tones appear muted, desaturated, and drained of warmth. The pale areas hint at curved contours but dissolve into ambiguity, creating a dreamlike, disembodied impression where the subject seems to float in an oppressive void.
